cves.description: EternalBlue - SMBv1 remote code execution vulnerability allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets.
cves.fix_description: Apply MS17-010 security update. Disable SMBv1 if not needed.

cves.description: Zerologon - Netlogon elevation of privilege vulnerability allowing attackers to establish a Netlogon secure channel connection to a domain controller using a null session.
cves.fix_description: Apply the August 2020 security update. Enforce secure RPC for Netlogon channels.

cves.description: PrintNightmare - Windows Print Spooler remote code execution vulnerability allowing attackers to install programs, view/change/delete data, or create new accounts with full user rights.
cves.fix_description: Apply the out-of-band security update. Disable the Print Spooler service if not required.

cves.description: Windows Print Spooler remote code execution vulnerability (original PrintNightmare). Allows local privilege escalation and remote code execution.
cves.fix_description: Apply the June 2021 cumulative update.

cves.description: Log4Shell - Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints. Affects Java-based Windows applications using Log4j.
cves.fix_description: Update Log4j to 2.17.1 or later. Remove JndiLookup class from classpath.

cves.description: ProxyLogon - Microsoft Exchange Server server-side request forgery vulnerability allowing authentication bypass and remote code execution.
cves.fix_description: Apply the March 2021 Exchange Server security updates immediately.

cves.description: ProxyShell - Microsoft Exchange Server remote code execution vulnerability allowing unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands.
cves.fix_description: Apply the April/May 2021 Exchange Server cumulative updates.

cves.description: ProxyShell - Microsoft Exchange Server elevation of privilege vulnerability in the PowerShell backend.
cves.fix_description: Apply the April/May 2021 Exchange Server cumulative updates.

cves.description: ProxyShell - Microsoft Exchange Server security feature bypass vulnerability allowing post-authentication arbitrary file write.
cves.fix_description: Apply the May 2021 Exchange Server security updates.

cves.description: MSHTML Remote Code Execution - Microsoft MSHTML engine vulnerability exploited via crafted ActiveX controls in Office documents.
cves.fix_description: Apply the September 2021 cumulative security update. Disable ActiveX controls in Internet Explorer.

cves.description: Follina - Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) remote code execution vulnerability exploited through crafted Office documents calling MSDT via ms-msdt protocol.
cves.fix_description: Apply the June 2022 cumulative update. Disable the MSDT URL protocol as a workaround.

cves.description: CurveBall - Windows CryptoAPI spoofing vulnerability allowing attackers to spoof code-signing certificates and sign malicious executables.
cves.fix_description: Apply the January 2020 Patch Tuesday update.

cves.description: SIGRed - Windows DNS Server remote code execution vulnerability. Wormable, CVSS 10.0 rated.
cves.fix_description: Apply the July 2020 security update. Apply registry workaround to limit TCP DNS response size.

cves.description: Microsoft Exchange Server insecure deserialization vulnerability in the Unified Messaging service, part of ProxyLogon chain.
cves.fix_description: Apply the March 2021 Exchange Server security updates.

cves.description: Atlassian Confluence Server OGNL injection vulnerability allowing unauthenticated remote code execution. Impacts Windows Confluence installations.
cves.fix_description: Update Confluence to the latest patched version (7.4.17, 7.13.7, 7.14.3, 7.15.2, 7.16.4, 7.17.4, 7.18.1 or later).

cves.description: ProxyNotShell - Microsoft Exchange Server elevation of privilege vulnerability via server-side request forgery.
cves.fix_description: Apply the November 2022 Exchange Server security updates.

cves.description: ProxyNotShell - Microsoft Exchange Server remote code execution vulnerability via PowerShell remoting.
cves.fix_description: Apply the November 2022 Exchange Server security updates.

cves.description: Microsoft Outlook elevation of privilege vulnerability. Attackers can exploit this by sending a crafted email to steal NTLM credentials without user interaction.
cves.fix_description: Apply the March 2023 security update for Outlook.

cves.description: Office and Windows HTML remote code execution vulnerability exploited via specially crafted Microsoft Office documents.
cves.fix_description: Apply the August 2023 security updates. Block all Office applications from creating child processes as a workaround.

cves.description: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack - denial of service vulnerability affecting Windows HTTP/2 implementations including IIS.
cves.fix_description: Apply the October 2023 cumulative security update. Configure HTTP/2 limits.

cves.description: Windows SmartScreen security feature bypass vulnerability allowing attackers to bypass SmartScreen protection.
cves.fix_description: Apply the February 2024 Patch Tuesday update.

cves.description: Internet Shortcut Files security feature bypass vulnerability allowing attackers to bypass Mark of the Web warnings.
cves.fix_description: Apply the February 2024 Patch Tuesday update.

cves.description: Windows Kernel elevation of privilege vulnerability allowing local attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.
cves.fix_description: Apply the June 2024 Patch Tuesday update.

cves.description: SMBGhost - Windows SMBv3 Client/Server remote code execution vulnerability. Wormable vulnerability in SMBv3 compression.
cves.fix_description: Apply the KB4551762 update. Disable SMBv3 compression as a workaround.

cves.description: PetitPotam - Windows LSA spoofing vulnerability allowing NTLM relay attacks against Active Directory Certificate Services.
cves.fix_description: Apply the August 2021 security update. Enable EPA on AD CS and disable NTLM on domain controllers.

cves.description: HTTP Protocol Stack remote code execution vulnerability. Wormable, allows unauthenticated attackers to send specially crafted packets to Windows HTTP servers.
cves.fix_description: Apply the January 2022 Patch Tuesday update. Disable HTTP Trailer Support as a workaround.

cves.description: Windows Graphics Component remote code execution vulnerability exploited in the wild. Allows code execution via malicious image files.
cves.fix_description: Apply the February 2023 Patch Tuesday update. Update Microsoft Office from Microsoft Store.

cves.description: Windows Common Log File System Driver elevation of privilege vulnerability allowing local attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.
cves.fix_description: Apply the December 2024 Patch Tuesday update.

cves.description: Windows OLE remote code execution vulnerability. Attackers can exploit this via a specially crafted email viewed in Microsoft Outlook.
cves.fix_description: Apply the January 2025 Patch Tuesday update. Read emails in plain text as a workaround.

cves.description: Windows Storage elevation of privilege vulnerability allowing local attackers to delete targeted files on a system leading to denial of service.
cves.fix_description: Apply the February 2025 Patch Tuesday update.
